k = 9
2 vs 1 -> take R[j]
A = [1, _, _, _, _, _, _, _]
j moves to 2

k = 16
7 vs INF -> take L[i]
A = [1, 2, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
i moves to 5

span.p: Once either side exposes INF, the remaining values come from the other side
